properties.description: Full name of the employee
Unique identifier for the employee
Email address of the employee
Primary domain/region of the employee
Organization/Department of the employee
Job title/role of the employee
Name of the employee's manager
Name of the training activity
Unique code for the training activity
Type of training activity
Start date of the training activity
End date of the training activity
Whether the activity is a certification
Current status of the training
Date when the training was assigned
Due date for completing the training
Expiration date of the training/certification
Date when the training was completed
Whether the training was completed after the due date
Whether the employee is compliant with training requirements
Whether the training is assigned to the employee

columns.name: assignment_mode
columns.expression: CASE WHEN ManagerName IS NOT NULL AND ManagerName != '' THEN 'Manager-Assigned' ELSE 'Self-Assigned' END

properties.description: How the training was assigned (Self vs Manager)
Records of employee training activities and compliance status

measure.name: total_users
measure.expression: COUNT(DISTINCT EmployeeID)

measure.name: certified_users
measure.expression: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN isCertification = true AND TrainingStatus = 'Completed' THEN EmployeeID END)

measure.name: certification_completion_rate
measure.expression: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN isCertification = true AND TrainingStatus = 'Completed' THEN EmployeeID END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN isCertification = true THEN EmployeeID END), 0)

measure.name: total_trainings
measure.expression: COUNT(*)

measure.name: completed_trainings
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN TrainingStatus = 'Completed' THEN 1 END)

measure.name: overdue_trainings_count
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN TrainingStatus = 'Overdue' THEN 1 END)

measure.name: compliant_users
measure.expression: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN isCompliant = true THEN EmployeeID END)

measure.name: compliance_rate
measure.expression: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN isCompliant = true THEN EmployeeID END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT EmployeeID)

measure.name: upcoming_expirations
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN ExpirationDate BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '30 days' THEN 1 END)

properties.description: Comprehensive metrics for admin dashboard views

measure.name: team_members_count
measure.expression: COUNT(DISTINCT EmployeeID)

measure.name: team_certified_count
measure.expression: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN isCertification = true AND TrainingStatus = 'Completed' THEN EmployeeID END)

measure.name: team_compliance_rate
measure.expression: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN isCompliant = true THEN EmployeeID END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT EmployeeID)

measure.name: team_overdue_count
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN TrainingStatus = 'Overdue' THEN 1 END)

measure.name: trainings_per_employee
measure.expression: COUNT(*) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT EmployeeID)

properties.description: Metrics for manager team oversight and tracking

measure.name: total_certifications_assigned
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN isCertification = true THEN 1 END)

measure.name: total_certifications_completed
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN isCertification = true AND TrainingStatus = 'Completed' THEN 1 END)

measure.name: certifications_in_progress
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN isCertification = true AND TrainingStatus IN ('In Progress', 'Assigned') THEN 1 END)

measure.name: certification_completion_percentage
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN isCertification = true AND TrainingStatus = 'Completed' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN isCertification = true THEN 1 END), 0)

measure.name: certifications_expiring_soon
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN isCertification = true AND ExpirationDate BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '90 days' THEN 1 END)

properties.description: Specialized metrics for certification tracking and management

measure.name: overall_compliance_rate
measure.expression: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN isCompliant = true THEN EmployeeID END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT EmployeeID)

measure.name: late_completions_count
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN SatisfiedLate = true THEN 1 END)

measure.name: at_risk_users
measure.expression: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ExpirationDate BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '30 days' THEN EmployeeID END)

measure.name: non_compliant_users
measure.expression: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN isCompliant = false THEN EmployeeID END)

properties.description: Metrics focused on compliance tracking and risk identification

measure.name: training_assignments_count
measure.expression: COUNT(*)

measure.name: unique_participants
measure.expression: COUNT(DISTINCT EmployeeID)

measure.name: completion_count
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN TrainingStatus = 'Completed' THEN 1 END)

measure.name: average_completion_rate
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN TrainingStatus = 'Completed' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)

measure.name: self_assigned_count
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN assignment_mode = 'Self-Assigned' THEN 1 END)

measure.name: manager_assigned_count
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN assignment_mode = 'Manager-Assigned' THEN 1 END)

properties.description: Analytics metrics for training program insights and trends

measure.name: cumulative_completions
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN TrainingStatus = 'Completed' THEN 1 END)

properties.description: Track cumulative training completions over time

measure.name: compliance_rate_trend
measure.expression: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN isCompliant = true THEN EmployeeID END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT EmployeeID)

properties.description: Track compliance rate changes over quarters

measure.name: expiring_certifications
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN isCertification = true AND ExpirationDate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END)

properties.description: Predict certification renewal needs
View of all overdue training activities

views.name: upcoming_certifications
views.statement: SELECT * FROM employee_training_records WHERE isCertification = true AND ExpirationDate > CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY ExpirationDate

properties.description: View of upcoming certification expirations

views.name: team_overdue_summary
views.statement: SELECT ManagerName, COUNT(*) as overdue_count, COUNT(DISTINCT EmployeeID) as affected_employees FROM employee_training_records WHERE TrainingStatus = 'Overdue' GROUP BY ManagerName ORDER BY overdue_count DESC

properties.description: Manager-level view of overdue training assignments

views.name: compliance_heatmap_data
views.statement: SELECT PrimaryDomain, PrimaryOrganization, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN isCompliant = true THEN EmployeeID END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT EmployeeID) as compliance_percentage FROM employee_training_records GROUP BY PrimaryDomain, PrimaryOrganization

properties.description: Data for domain-wise compliance heatmap visualization

views.name: training_popularity_ranking
views.statement: SELECT ActivityName, ActivityType, COUNT(*) as assignment_count, COUNT(DISTINCT EmployeeID) as unique_participants, COUNT(CASE WHEN TrainingStatus = 'Completed' THEN 1 END) as completions FROM employee_training_records GROUP BY ActivityName, ActivityType ORDER BY assignment_count DESC

properties.description: Ranked view of most popular training activities
Enumeration of possible training statuses
How training was assigned to employee
